hooks.command: bash -c 'set -e; if git_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -f "$git_root/plugins/porter-codex-plugin/hooks/workflow-guard.sh" ]; then exec bash "$git_root/plugins/porter-codex-plugin/hooks/workflow-guard.sh"; fi; script=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/porter-codex-plugin/*/hooks/workflow-guard.sh" -print -quit 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$script" ] && exec bash "$script"; echo "[workflow-guard] cannot locate workflow-guard.sh" >&2; exit 1'

bash -c 'set -e; if git_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -f "$git_root/plugins/porter-codex-plugin/hooks/workflow-guard.sh" ]; then exec bash "$git_root/plugins/porter-codex-plugin/hooks/workflow-guard.sh"; fi; script=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/porter-codex-plugin/*/hooks/workflow-guard.sh" -print -quit 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$script" ] && exec bash "$script"; echo "[workflow-guard] cannot locate workflow-guard.sh" >&2; exit 1'
